## Meeting Purpose

[To discuss client management strategies, organizational structure, and quality improvement initiatives for growthx.ai.](https://fathom.video/share/7xyd44Fz1CseSE8M86RT9zHtE3etXvZ7?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Directors should own new client relationships for the first 12 weeks before transitioning to MEs](https://fathom.video/share/7xyd44Fz1CseSE8M86RT9zHtE3etXvZ7?tab=summary&timestamp=677.0)
  - [Need to improve client communication, meeting agendas, and value demonstration](https://fathom.video/share/7xyd44Fz1CseSE8M86RT9zHtE3etXvZ7?tab=summary&timestamp=1307.0)
  - [Content quality and strategy need more focus; every piece should build the client's brand](https://fathom.video/share/7xyd44Fz1CseSE8M86RT9zHtE3etXvZ7?tab=summary&timestamp=1488.0)
  - [Organizational structure and workflows are still being optimized as the company scales rapidly](https://fathom.video/share/7xyd44Fz1CseSE8M86RT9zHtE3etXvZ7?tab=summary&timestamp=1528.0)

## Topics

### Current Client Status and Strategies

  - [SmithAI and GC.ai identified as potentially at-risk accounts needing attention](https://fathom.video/share/7xyd44Fz1CseSE8M86RT9zHtE3etXvZ7?tab=summary&timestamp=3326.0)
  - [Ramp highlighted as a crucial logo client; building strong relationship is key](https://fathom.video/share/7xyd44Fz1CseSE8M86RT9zHtE3etXvZ7?tab=summary&timestamp=3644.0)
  - [Prophecy, Superhuman, and Galileo noted as accounts with upsell potential](https://fathom.video/share/7xyd44Fz1CseSE8M86RT9zHtE3etXvZ7?tab=summary&timestamp=3608.0)
  - [Need for more in-depth understanding of clients' businesses and audiences](https://fathom.video/share/7xyd44Fz1CseSE8M86RT9zHtE3etXvZ7?tab=summary&timestamp=1750.0)

### Content Quality and Strategy

  - [Goal: Every piece of content should be something clients would proudly share](https://fathom.video/share/7xyd44Fz1CseSE8M86RT9zHtE3etXvZ7?tab=summary&timestamp=1966.0)
  - [Need for deeper audience understanding and empathy in content creation](https://fathom.video/share/7xyd44Fz1CseSE8M86RT9zHtE3etXvZ7?tab=summary&timestamp=1768.0)
  - [Importance of setting clear editorial strategies for each client](https://fathom.video/share/7xyd44Fz1CseSE8M86RT9zHtE3etXvZ7?tab=summary&timestamp=1580.0)
  - [Matthew to review and provide feedback on CM-produced content](https://fathom.video/share/7xyd44Fz1CseSE8M86RT9zHtE3etXvZ7?tab=summary&timestamp=371.0)

### Client Communication and Meetings

  - [Weekly updates should set priorities and demonstrate value](https://fathom.video/share/7xyd44Fz1CseSE8M86RT9zHtE3etXvZ7?tab=summary&timestamp=1307.0)
  - [Meeting agendas need improvement to maximize effectiveness](https://fathom.video/share/7xyd44Fz1CseSE8M86RT9zHtE3etXvZ7?tab=summary&timestamp=1307.0)
  - [Transition to bi-weekly meetings for stable accounts after 6-8 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/7xyd44Fz1CseSE8M86RT9zHtE3etXvZ7?tab=summary&timestamp=3279.0)
  - [Directors should do 80% of talking in first 12 weeks, then transition to MEs](https://fathom.video/share/7xyd44Fz1CseSE8M86RT9zHtE3etXvZ7?tab=summary&timestamp=3597.0)

### Organizational Structure and Workflows

  - [Pod structure still being optimized](https://fathom.video/share/7xyd44Fz1CseSE8M86RT9zHtE3etXvZ7?tab=summary&timestamp=3923.0)
  - [Considering specialization at CM level before full account assignment](https://fathom.video/share/7xyd44Fz1CseSE8M86RT9zHtE3etXvZ7?tab=summary&timestamp=3857.0)
  - [Need to streamline workflows and improve efficiency across teams](https://fathom.video/share/7xyd44Fz1CseSE8M86RT9zHtE3etXvZ7?tab=summary&timestamp=3927.0)

### Quality Improvement Initiatives

  - [Matthew reviewing CM output to set quality standards](https://fathom.video/share/7xyd44Fz1CseSE8M86RT9zHtE3etXvZ7?tab=summary&timestamp=371.0)
  - [Marcel creating assignments for onboarding and skill development](https://fathom.video/share/7xyd44Fz1CseSE8M86RT9zHtE3etXvZ7?tab=summary&timestamp=1705.0)
  - [Mara to create templates for meeting notes, updates, and best practices](https://fathom.video/share/7xyd44Fz1CseSE8M86RT9zHtE3etXvZ7?tab=summary&timestamp=1293.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Mara to create templates and standards for customer relationship management, updates, and meeting best practices](https://fathom.video/share/7xyd44Fz1CseSE8M86RT9zHtE3etXvZ7?tab=summary&timestamp=4293.0)
  - [Update client database with accurate information and points of contact](https://fathom.video/share/7xyd44Fz1CseSE8M86RT9zHtE3etXvZ7?tab=summary&timestamp=3317.0)
  - [Directors to take more ownership of new client relationships in first 12 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/7xyd44Fz1CseSE8M86RT9zHtE3etXvZ7?tab=summary&timestamp=3677.0)
  - [Implement more rigorous content strategy and quality control measures](https://fathom.video/share/7xyd44Fz1CseSE8M86RT9zHtE3etXvZ7?tab=summary&timestamp=1488.0)
  - [Improve client communication and value demonstration in updates and meetings](https://fathom.video/share/7xyd44Fz1CseSE8M86RT9zHtE3etXvZ7?tab=summary&timestamp=1307.0)
